{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231555026E92B96984CF22114BD4"}"},"total":66},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7192844547515237120","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看好看，太少了，就喜欢这样的女主[码住][码住][码住]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1674714697,"group_id":"7181764711220775974","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不为瞬间的荣耀，而忘却持久的追求","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2vDRYckIGv5nX3vFX8GGfU=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"871274604933805","user_name":"钱聚宝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"871274604933805","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7181764711220775974","book_info":{"abstract":"【乱世+逃荒+种田+基建+无CP+女强+游戏世界+升级打怪】
江落苏本是一名游戏开发设计师，却在游戏上线前夕猝死了。
　　再睁眼就穿越到了一个三岁半的小姑娘身上，正跟着一大家子人在乱世中苦哈哈的逃荒。
　　一路上缺吃少喝不说，还要时刻防备着被人当成食物吃掉！
　　幸好她设计的游戏跟着来了，还能让她进入游戏中获取各种物品。
　　游戏里资源丰富啊！
　　开铺子，建酒楼，生活越来越好。
　　在游戏里收服远古灵兽，左手炼丹，右手炼器……
　　一不小心还炼出来一个钢铁将军，战无不胜，打的敌军哇哇叫！
　　妖娆爱美的食人花……
　　娇滴滴又爱哭的美人鱼……
　　还有一口能吃下几百斤矿石的云朵怪……
　　江落苏在这乱世之中，携一众灵兽魔怪，做女皇，平叛乱，创建属于她的太平盛世。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o53bf53a295beaa63312542fb5d3ddfa4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"仙鹿儿","author_id":"","book_id":"7181764711220775974","book_name":"开局逃荒，我带全家修仙后当女帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a0a0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":557,"name":"逃荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=557&name=逃荒&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7182441050538312192","read_count":"90","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"336848"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"165","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,女强,无CP,今穿古,逃荒,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/229b40322a38c08c59668b31b69666fb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436503&x-signature=jtSi0qbxUXUgzdo2LHlz9z9LvoI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3091477830315063","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.470198e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231555026E92B96984CF22114BD4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6470,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3808},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1674736361,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7342055513380651800","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实，女主随身的游戏其他人也可以进入这一点，我觉得还蛮新奇的。因为这个游戏不可能女主在现实世界身死后直接下架吧。就是女主本身在那个游戏世界里的角色问题，有待补充吧。因为现实世界玩游戏的人或者设计游戏的人刚好碰到女主在游戏世界里面的话，那我就觉得双方都会觉得很奇怪。这是一个最说不通的很奇怪的一个点。还有就是你知道那个二叔我挺不理解他的存在的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709457516,"group_id":"7181764711220775974","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"107767018820"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7181764711220775974","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"190"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24818,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7342053913409323800","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉里面好几个伏笔不太有必要，感觉有点多余。人物来讲，还行吧，没有很出彩的，不过中规中矩不出错。整体还不错，就是中间一点的地方会有点点看不下去的感觉。大概就这样吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709457289,"group_id":"7181764711220775974","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望遵循本心，认真创作，开心创作。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0ASgPTScu6GtrR1dju2mhc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0, 江落苏本是一名游戏开发设计师，却在游戏上线前夕猝死了。
　　再睁眼就穿越到了一个三岁半的小姑娘身上，正跟着一大家子人在乱世中苦哈哈的逃荒。
　　一路上缺吃少喝不说，还要时刻防备着被人当成食物吃掉！
　　幸好她设计的游戏跟着来了，还能让她进入游戏中获取各种物品。
　　游戏里资源丰富啊！
　　开铺子，建酒楼，生活越来越好。
　　在游戏里收服远古灵兽，左手炼丹，右手炼器……
　　一不小心还炼出来一个钢铁将军，战无不胜，打的敌军哇哇叫！
　　妖娆爱美的食人花……
　　娇滴滴又爱哭的美人鱼……
　　还有一口能吃下几百斤矿石的云朵怪……
